Type of Funds:
This project is privately funded, on private land for private use.
Scope of Work:
10,245 SF shell retail building with 1703 SF of that being dedicated to a Domino's restaurant that will be built at the same time.
Square Footage:
10,245 ft 2
Are the private funds provided by the tenant?
No

Review Complete

Registered accessibility specialists (RAS) set and collect the fees for their services. Contact the RAS directly if you have questions about their performing plan review or inspection services.

In accordance with 16 TEX. ADMIN. CODE §68.52, the owner of a building or facility must obtain an inspection from a RAS no later than the first anniversary of the completion of construction. A request for inspection must be made by submitting a written request for inspection to the RAS no later than 30 calendar days after the completion of construction.
